name: Asparagus Salad with Raspberry Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 large red bell pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the asparagus pieces for 2 minutes.
2. Plunge into cold water to stop cooking. Drain.
3. Place asparagus, red pepper and onion into a plastic bowl (with cover).
4. Blend vinegar, water, honey and parsley in a separate bowl; pour over vegetables.
5. Adjust seasonings if desired (may want to add more sweetness).
6. Stir, cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
7. Stir occasionally.
8. Serve cold.
